name: capture
description: Quick-capture skill for instant thought entry. Optimized for low-friction capture with prefix-based type detection.

usage.description: Send a single string with an optional prefix to instantly create an item. The prefix determines the type. If no prefix is provided, it defaults to 'note'.

prefixes.t:: task — e.g. 't: Fix the deployment script'
prefixes.n:: note — e.g. 'n: API rate limits are 100/min'
prefixes.i:: idea — e.g. 'i: Add weekly digest email'

capture.description: Quick-capture a thought. Parse the prefix to set type, then POST.

type.description: Auto-detected from prefix: t:→task, n:→note, i:→idea. Default: note

content.description: Optional additional detail. Default: empty string

examples.input: t: Ship the landing page by Friday

body.title: Ship the landing page by Friday

examples.input: n: SQLite WAL mode enables concurrent reads

body.title: SQLite WAL mode enables concurrent reads

examples.input: i: Add a weekly review that summarizes all items

body.title: Add a weekly review that summarizes all items

workflow: 1. Agent receives a quick thought from the user
2. Parse prefix: t: → task, n: → note, i: → idea, no prefix → note
4. POST /api/items with type, title, and optional mode/tags/agent_id
